quote: Reckon scope before laying stones. If you cannot name the finish line, the task is too large.
label: count the cost
pattern: Reckon scope before laying stones.
apply: Name the concrete finish-line state. If you can't, shrink until you can.

quote: Storms reveal foundations. The artifact tested before the storm is the one that holds.
label: house on rock
pattern: Storms reveal foundations.
apply: Run the tests or an end-to-end call this step. If no foundation yet, write one failing test first.

quote: Sufficient unto the day is its own work. Do not borrow tomorrow's problem.
label: today's trouble
pattern: Do not borrow tomorrow's problem.
apply: Work only on the next concrete step. Resist refactoring for hypothetical needs.

quote: The honest confession of partial knowledge is where help arrives. Probe before patching blind.
label: name the unknown
pattern: Honest uncertainty unblocks investigation.
apply: Name what you don't know about this bug. Probe the unknown before patching blind.

quote: One failing case is more informative than ninety-nine that pass. Chase the loss before returning to the herd.
label: the one failing case
pattern: One failing case carries more signal than many passing ones.
apply: Chase the single failing test or edge. Fix it before returning to the herd.

quote: Ship the smallest working slice that grows. The runnable skeleton outranks the perfect blueprint.
label: the smallest seed
pattern: Ship the smallest working slice that grows.
apply: Commit the skeleton that runs before growing it.

quote: Working code still needs cutting. Every dead branch starves the live ones.
label: prune the green branch
pattern: Working code still needs cutting.
apply: After a green test, delete the scaffolding, dead branch, duplicated helper.

quote: New content needs a fitting structure. If the feature strains the abstraction, reshape it before continuing.
label: new content, new vessel
pattern: New feature needs a fitting vessel.
apply: If the feature strains the abstraction, reshape it before continuing.

quote: Three honest axes of search; after three, absence is evidence.
label: three honest searches
pattern: Three honest axes of search; after three, absence is evidence.
apply: Search the codebase for prior art three ways (grep, file, test) before guessing.

quote: A small impurity spreads through the whole. Tainted input infects the pure body.
label: a little contamination
pattern: Tainted input spreads through the pure body.
apply: Don't let test fixtures, mocks, or debug flags leak into production paths.

quote: A single-window win is not trans-window truth. Vary the conditions before celebrating.
label: every season
pattern: A single-window win is not trans-window truth.
apply: Before celebrating a passing run, vary the seed, input, conditions.

quote: Two tests on different conditions catch what one cannot. They must not share a failure mode.
label: two independent tests
pattern: Two independent tests on different conditions.
apply: Verify two ways that can't share a failure mode — unit + integration, local + staging.

quote: Three dramatic attempts failed; the quiet channel carries the signal. Retire the grand attempt.
label: the quiet channel
pattern: Three dramatic attempts failed; the quiet channel carries the signal.
apply: If three tries failed, keep the one quiet thing that works. Retire the grand attempt.

quote: After six phases, stop. The seventh attempt does not produce truth — the pause does.
label: forced stop
pattern: Forced stop after six phases.
apply: If six attempts on the same sub-problem, stop and re-plan instead of a seventh.

quote: One rule for all domains produces confusion. Resist a single helper spanning unrelated concerns.
label: do not unify the unrelated
pattern: One rule for all domains produces confusion.
apply: Resist a single config/helper spanning unrelated domains.

quote: Cross-domain proofs of power are refused. Keep the contract tight.
label: refuse the grand demo
pattern: Grand cross-domain proofs of power are refused.
apply: Reject temptations to prove the module can do everything. Keep its contract tight.

quote: The boring fix heals where the ambitious rewrite fails.
label: the small humble fix
pattern: Grand fix refused in favor of small humble practice.
apply: Prefer the boring fix — bounds check, retry, clear error — over the ambitious rewrite.

quote: Validated and unvalidated cannot plow together. Gate the unvetted dependency before merging.
label: do not yoke unequally
pattern: Validated + unvalidated cannot plow together.
apply: Don't merge an unvetted dependency into the validated flow. Gate behind a flag.

quote: Routing, contract, runtime. Distinct functions inside one whole — do not collapse them.
label: three roles, one unity
pattern: Distinct functions within one unity.
apply: Separate the three roles: routing (way), contract (truth), runtime (life). Don't collapse them.

quote: Small working things earn larger responsibility. Ship the small version before expanding.
label: faithful in little
pattern: Small working things earn larger responsibility.
apply: Ship the small working version before expanding.

quote: Full obedience to the small instruction; the result follows. Handle the null case, write the missing test.
label: fill to the brim
pattern: Full coverage of the small instruction unlocks the next step.
apply: Do the unglamorous full-coverage step: handle the null case, write the missing test, fix the lint.

quote: You are careful and troubled about many things, but one thing is needful. Name it; close every other tab.
label: one thing is needful
pattern: One thing is needful.
apply: Name the one thing this step must finish. Close every other tab.

quote: Friction between two makes edges. Read back the last step's output critically before continuing.
label: iron sharpens iron
pattern: Friction between two makes edges.
apply: Read back the last step's output critically before continuing.

quote: A threefold cord is not quickly broken. Redundancy on the load-bearing path is strength.
label: threefold cord
pattern: Redundancy is strength.
apply: For the load-bearing path, add a second check: a type, a test, a logged assertion.
